n1_sections.layout_justification: A premium chat experience focuses on the conversation flow. The 'chat_thread' layout ensures clear message display. Floating elements provide contextual actions without disrupting the core dialogue.
n1_sections.svg_payload:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1000 600" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="gradS" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#4f46e5"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#7c3aed"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="gradUser" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#e5e7eb"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#d1d5db"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <filter id="shadow" x="-20%" y="-20%" width="140%" height="140%">
      <feDropShadow dx="0" dy="4" stdDeviation="6" flood-color="#000" flood-opacity=".12"/>
    </filter>
  </defs>

  <!-- Bulles Conversation -->
  <g id="comp_chat_bubbles">
    <!-- Sullivan -->
    <rect x="80" y="60" width="420" height="90" rx="24" fill="url(#gradS)" filter="url(#shadow)"/>
    <text x="110" y="100" fill="#fff" font-size="18" font-family="Arial">Bonjour ! Je suis Sullivan, votre assistant.</text>
    <text x="110" y="125" fill="#fff" font-size="18" font-family="Arial">Quel est votre objectif principal aujourd’hui ?</text>

    <!-- User -->
    <rect x="500" y="170" width="420" height="60" rx="24" fill="url(#gradUser)" filter="url(#shadow)"/>
    <text x="530" y="205" fill="#111" font-size="18" font-family="Arial">Je souhaite créer un site vitrine pour mon entreprise.</text>

    <!-- Sullivan -->
    <rect x="80" y="250" width="420" height="60" rx="24" fill="url(#gradS)" filter="url(#shadow)"/>
    <text x="110" y="285" fill="#fff" font-size="18" font-family="Arial">Parfait ! Quel secteur d’activité ?</text>
  </g>

  <!-- Réponse Question -->
  <g id="comp_chat_answer">
    <rect x="80" y="340" width="280" height="90" rx="16" fill="#fff" stroke="#e5e7eb" stroke-width="2" filter="url(#shadow)"/>
    <text x="100" y="375" fill="#111" font-size="18" font-family="Arial">🛍️ Commerce / Retail</text>

    <rect x="380" y="340" width="280" height="90" rx="16" fill="#fff" stroke="#e5e7eb" stroke-width="2" filter="url(#shadow)"/>
    <text x="400" y="375" fill="#111" font-size="18" font-family="Arial">💼 Services B2B</text>

    <rect x="680" y="340" width="280" height="90" rx="16" fill="#fff" stroke="#e5e7eb" stroke-width="2" filter="url(#shadow)"/>
    <text x="700" y="375" fill="#111" font-size="18" font-family="Arial">🏢 Immobilier</text>
  </g>

  <!-- Input Message -->
  <g id="comp_chat_input">
    <rect x="80" y="460" width="720" height="70" rx="35" fill="#fff" stroke="#d1d5db" stroke-width="2" filter="url(#shadow)"/>
    <text x="110" y="500" fill="#9ca3af" font-size="18" font-family="Arial">Tapez votre message…</text>
    <circle cx="750" cy="495" r="25" fill="#4f46e5"/>
    <path d="M740 485 l20 10 -20 10 5 -10 z" fill="#fff"/>
    <text x="800" y="500" fill="#9ca3af" font-size="24" font-family="Arial">😊</text>
  </g>

  <!-- Passer Dialogue -->
  <g id="comp_chat_skip">
    <rect x="830" y="460" width="130" height="70" rx="35" fill="none" stroke="#9ca3af" stroke-width="2"/>
    <text x="880" y="500" fill="#4b5563" font-size="18" font-family="Arial" text-anchor="middle">Passer</text>
  </g>
</svg>

n1_sections.layout_justification: The stepper_wizard layout provides a clear, linear progression through the onboarding flow. The breadcrumb provides context, and the main area focuses on the current step in the process. The button is implied by the wizard step. This is a premium and engaging user experience.
n1_sections.svg_payload:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1000 600" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
  <!-- Background -->
  <rect width="1000" height="600" fill="#f6f7f9"/>

  <!-- Header breadcrumb -->
  <g id="breadcrumb">
    <rect x="40" y="30" width="920" height="44" rx="8" fill="#ffffff" stroke="#e1e4e8" stroke-width="1"/>
    <text x="60" y="55" font-size="14" fill="#586069">Phase 3</text>
    <path d="M130 45h10m-5-4l5 4-5 4" stroke="#586069" stroke-width="2" fill="none"/>
    <text x="160" y="55" font-size="14" fill="#586069">Étape 5</text>
    <path d="M230 45h10m-5-4l5 4-5 4" stroke="#586069" stroke-width="2" fill="none"/>
    <text x="260" y="55" font-size="14" fill="#24292e" font-weight="600">Section</text>
  </g>

  <!-- 9-step horizontal stepper -->
  <g id="stepper">
    <!-- Stepper background card -->
    <rect x="40" y="110" width="920" height="100" rx="12" fill="#ffffff" stroke="#e1e4e8" stroke-width="1"/>
    
    <!-- Connector lines -->
    <line x1="130" y1="160" x2="210" y2="160" stroke="#28a745" stroke-width="2"/>
    <line x1="230" y1="160" x2="310" y2="160" stroke="#28a745" stroke-width="2"/>
    <line x1="330" y1="160" x2="410" y2="160" stroke="#28a745" stroke-width="2"/>
    <line x1="430" y1="160" x2="510" y2="160" stroke="#28a745" stroke-width="2"/>
    <line x1="530" y1="160" x2="610" y2="160" stroke="#28a745" stroke-width="2"/>
    <line x1="630" y1="160" x2="710" y2="160" stroke="#cbd5e0" stroke-width="2"/>
    <line x1="730" y1="160" x2="810" y2="160" stroke="#cbd5e0" stroke-width="2"/>
    <line x1="830" y1="160" x2="910" y2="160" stroke="#cbd5e0" stroke-width="2"/>

    <!-- Step 1 completed -->
    <circle cx="100" cy="160" r="18" fill="#28a745"/>
    <text x="100" y="165" text-anchor="middle" font-size="12" fill="#ffffff" font-weight="600">1</text>
    <text x="100" y="195" text-anchor="middle" font-size="12" fill="#586069">Brief</text>

    <!-- Step 2 completed -->
    <circle cx="220" cy="160" r="18" fill="#28a745"/>
    <text x="220" y="165" text-anchor="middle" font-size="12" fill="#ffffff" font-weight="600">2</text>
    <text x="220" y="195" text-anchor="middle" font-size="12" fill="#586069">Sitemap</text>

    <!-- Step 3 completed -->
    <circle cx="340" cy="160" r="18" fill="#28a745"/>
    <text x="340" y="165" text-anchor="middle" font-size="12" fill="#ffffff" font-weight="600">3</text>
    <text x="340" y="195" text-anchor="middle" font-size="12" fill="#586069">Wireframe</text>

    <!-- Step 4 completed -->
    <circle cx="460" cy="160" r="18" fill="#28a745"/>
    <text x="460" y="165" text-anchor="middle" font-size="12" fill="#ffffff" font-weight="600">4</text>
    <text x="460" y="195" text-anchor="middle" font-size="12" fill="#586069">Design</text>

    <!-- Step 5 active -->
    <circle cx="580" cy="160" r="18" fill="#0366d6" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="3"/>
    <text x="580" y="165" text-anchor="middle" font-size="12" fill="#ffffff" font-weight="600">5</text>
    <text x="580" y="195" text-anchor="middle" font-size="12" fill="#0366d6" font-weight="600">Content</text>

    <!-- Step 6 future -->
    <circle cx="700" cy="160" r="18" fill="#e1e4e8" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="3"/>
    <text x="700" y="165" text-anchor="middle" font-size="12" fill="#586069">6</text>
    <text x="700" y="195" text-anchor="middle" font-size="12" fill="#586069">Build</text>

    <!-- Step 7 future -->
    <circle cx="820" cy="160" r="18" fill="#e1e4e8" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="3"/>
    <text x="820" y="165" text-anchor="middle" font-size="12" fill="#586069">7</text>
    <text x="820" y="195" text-anchor="middle" font-size="12" fill="#586069">QA</text>

    <!-- Step 8 future -->
    <circle cx="940" cy="160" r="18" fill="#e1e4e8" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="3"/>
    <text x="940" y="165" text-anchor="middle" font-size="12" fill="#586069">8</text>
    <text x="940" y="195" text-anchor="middle" font-size="12" fill="#586069">Launch</text>
  </g>

  <!-- Next button -->
  <g id="next_button">
    <defs>
      <linearGradient id="btnGrad" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
        <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#28a745"/>
        <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#218838"/>
      </linearGradient>
    </defs>
    <rect x="800" y="250" width="160" height="48" rx="24" fill="url(#btnGrad)"/>
    <text x="880" y="278" text-anchor="middle" font-size="15" fill="#ffffff" font-weight="600">Étape suivante</text>
    <path d="M910 265l6 6-6 6m-3-6h12" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="2" fill="none"/>
  </g>

  <!-- Helper text -->
  <text x="60" y="280" font-size="13" fill="#586069">Prérequis validés • Vous pouvez avancer</text>
</svg>

n1_sections.layout_justification: The 'export_download' strategy directly addresses the module's purpose. The main area focuses on the primary action (download) and a secondary action (new session), while the modal confirmation appears as a floating element for critical user feedback.
n1_sections.svg_payload:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1000 600" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="btnGrad" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#6c5ce7"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#4a37d0"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="cardGrad" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#ffffff"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#f7f9ff"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <filter id="shadow" x="-10%" y="-10%" width="120%" height="120%">
      <feDropShadow dx="0" dy="4" stdDeviation="6" flood-color="#000" flood-opacity=".12"/>
    </filter>
  </defs>

  <!-- Main card -->
  <rect x="120" y="120" width="760" height="360" rx="16" fill="url(#cardGrad)" filter="url(#shadow)"/>
  <rect x="140" y="140" width="720" height="160" rx="12" fill="#f1f3ff" stroke="#e0e4ff" stroke-width="1"/>

  <!-- Placeholder thumbnail -->
  <rect x="160" y="160" width="120" height="120" rx="8" fill="#dfe3ff"/>
  <path d="M200 210 L220 190 L250 220 L270 200 L300 230 L300 250 L200 250 Z" fill="#a8b0ff" opacity=".6"/>
  <circle cx="240" cy="220" r="18" fill="#6c5ce7" opacity=".8"/>

  <!-- File info -->
  <text x="300" y="190" font-size="18" fill="#2d3436" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-weight="600">theme-package.zip</text>
  <text x="300" y="210" font-size="14" fill="#636e72">2.3 MB • 42 fichiers • 12/07/2024 14:32</text>

  <!-- Download button -->
  <rect x="300" y="230" width="180" height="44" rx="22" fill="url(#btnGrad)" filter="url(#shadow)"/>
  <path d="M350 250 L370 270 L390 250 M370 240 L370 270" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round" fill="none"/>
  <text x="410" y="256" font-size="16" fill="#fff" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-weight="600">Télécharger ZIP</text>

  <!-- New session button -->
  <rect x="520" y="230" width="180" height="44" rx="22" fill="#dfe6e9" stroke="#b2bec3" stroke-width="1"/>
  <path d="M590 240 L590 250 L600 250 M600 240 L590 250 L600 260" stroke="#2d3436" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" fill="none"/>
  <text x="620" y="256" font-size="16" fill="#2d3436" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-weight="600">Nouvelle session</text>

  <!-- Modal -->
  <rect x="250" y="80" width="500" height="240" rx="16" fill="#ffffff" filter="url(#shadow)" stroke="#e0e0e0" stroke-width="1"/>
  <rect x="250" y="80" width="500" height="60" rx="16" fill="#f7f9ff"/>
  <text x="280" y="118" font-size="20" fill="#2d3436" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-weight="700">Confirmer le téléchargement</text>
  <text x="280" y="180" font-size="15" fill="#636e72">Êtes-vous sûr de vouloir télécharger l’archive ZIP ?</text>

  <!-- Modal buttons -->
  <rect x="420" y="270" width="80" height="36" rx="18" fill="#dfe6e9" stroke="#b2bec3" stroke-width="1"/>
  <text x="460" y="293" font-size="14" fill="#2d3436" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" text-anchor="middle">Annuler</text>

  <rect x="520" y="270" width="80" height="36" rx="18" fill="url(#btnGrad)" filter="url(#shadow)"/>
  <text x="560" y="293" font-size="14" fill="#fff" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" text-anchor="middle">Confirmer</text>
</svg>
